\# Token Constraints \& Format

\- \*\*Strictly Terse Output\*\*: Provide code-only responses whenever possible. No conversational fluff ("Sure, I can help with that..."), greetings, or conclusions.

\- \*\*No Explanations\*\*: Do not explain code logic, architecture, or syntax unless explicitly asked to "Explain" in the prompt.

\- \*\*Inline Comments Only\*\*: If an explanation is critical, put it as a short comment directly within the code block. 

\- \*\*Context-Aware Coding\*\*: Write targeted modifications rather than rewriting whole files. Use `// ... existing code ...` placeholders to preserve token space.
